subcodes.first_line: Some time ago, through His Honour the Trustee, upon him be the Glory of God, the True and Manifest King, the Most Holy and Most Great Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چندی قبل بتوسط جناب امین علیه بهاء الله الملک الحق المبین لوح امنع اقدس
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
